title: How MPB Health Works
subtitle: A step-by-step look at how community medical cost sharing operates.

steps.title: Join MPB Health
steps.body: Pick the membership tier that fits your household and budget. An advisor walks you through the entire enrollment process.

steps.title: Learn the Guidelines
steps.body: Get familiar with our member guidelines so you know exactly which expenses qualify for sharing and what to expect.

steps.title: Contribute Monthly
steps.body: Set up your monthly share contribution. Your IUA selection determines the balance between monthly cost and out-of-pocket responsibility.

steps.title: Share Medical Costs
steps.body: When an eligible medical need arises, file a sharing request through our portal. The community helps cover costs beyond your IUA.

steps.title: Thrive With Support
steps.body: Enjoy unlimited telehealth, behavioral health resources, and ongoing advisor access that keep you covered for whatever comes next.
